message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting across codebase

Consistent formatting pass:
- Flatten multi-line conditionals where appropriate
- Normalize import grouping and ordering
- Remove extra blank lines between functions
- Align match arms and closure bodies
- Format long function calls across multiple lines

Files: claude_code.rs, renderer.rs, template.rs, indexer/mod.rs,
query.rs, export_modal.rs, widgets.rs, tui.rs, reproduce_query_bug.rs

No functional changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
